home.description: Learn programming and system architecture in simple, easy-to-understand language.
home.subject1_desc: Understand how memory, binary math, and CPU architecture work from the ground up.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: An honest effort to explain complex programming concepts in a simple and easy-to-understand language.
about.creator: Ajit Gurav
about.creator_desc: . He is a professional software engineer with extensive experience in React, Next.js, JavaScript internals, and system architecture.
about.p2: He thoroughly understands the linguistic and technical challenges beginners face while learning to code. This platform was started not just to tell you 'what' to code, but to explain 'how' and 'why' it works.
about.mission_desc: Our ultimate goal is to make the fundamental knowledge of programming and computer science accessible to everyone and to provide in-depth guidance to help students advance in their careers. We believe in quality, not memorization!

contact.desc: Your feedback, queries, or suggestions are extremely important to us.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: (Terms of Service)
privacy.intro: Respecting your privacy is our top priority at AJDevIt. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information. By using our website, you consent to this privacy policy.
privacy.s1_l1: When you register on our platform (Login/Sign up) or subscribe to our newsletter, we may collect your name and email address.
privacy.s1_l2: Through services like Google Analytics, we may collect technical information such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited. This information is completely anonymous.
privacy.s2_desc: Our website uses 'Cookies' to enhance the user experience. These are small data files stored on your device. In the future, third-party services like Google AdSense may use these cookies to serve relevant ads.
privacy.s3_desc: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
privacy.s3_l1: To improve the quality of the website content.
privacy.s3_l2: To send you important updates and information.
privacy.s3_l3: To resolve your technical queries or questions.
privacy.s4_desc: We take industry-standard technical precautions to keep your data secure. We do not sell or illegally share your personal information with any third-party companies.
privacy.s5_desc: Our website may contain links to other websites. AJDevIt is not responsible for the privacy policies or content of those websites.
privacy.s6_desc: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy from time to time. Any significant changes will be updated on this page.
privacy.footer: If you have any questions regarding this privacy policy, please visit our

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.bio: I am a full-stack developer with a passion for understanding technology from its roots—from core programming (C, C++) to modern web development (React, Next.js). I have a deep interest in JavaScript internals (V8 engine) and building robust database architectures (MySQL, MongoDB).
portfolio.proj1_desc: A modern educational platform built with Next.js 15 and Tailwind CSS, supporting English, Marathi, and Hindi seamlessly via Next.js i18n.
portfolio.proj2_desc: Experience in building secure and fast backend systems and RESTful APIs using PHP, MySQL, and MongoDB.
portfolio.proj3_desc: A highly customized Android KLWP design application published on the Google Play Store under the 'A1 Guru' developer account.
portfolio.proj4_desc: Expertise in crafting fully responsive, pixel-perfect frontend designs using Tailwind CSS and Bootstrap.
